# Wilco Financial, LLC

> Wilco Financial is a Tennessee-registered investment adviser based in Nolensville, Williamson County. We provide fiduciary investment management and financial planning to individuals and families across the states where we're registered, with a specialty practice serving Southwest Airlines pilots and employees.

## Key Facts

- **Legal name:** Wilco Financial, LLC
- **Registration:** State-registered investment adviser (Tennessee)
- **Fiduciary status:** Yes — we are held to the fiduciary standard under the Investment Advisers Act of 1940
- **Advisory fee:** 0.85% per year of managed assets. No commissions. No product kickbacks. No hidden fees.
- **Custodian:** Charles Schwab (client assets held at Schwab in the client's name)
- **Mailing address:** 6688 Nolensville Rd, Ste 108 #3029, Brentwood, TN 37027
- **Based in:** Williamson County, Tennessee. Virtual meetings standard; in-person by appointment.
- **Phone:** (615) 237-8750
- **Email:** info@wilcofin.com
- **Scheduling:** https://calendly.com/wilcofinancial/30min

## Services

- Investment Management
- Financial Planning
- Retirement Planning
- Estate Planning (coordination with client's estate attorney)
- Multi-Generational Planning
- Charitable Planning

## Specialty Practice: Southwest Airlines Pilots and Employees

Wilco Financial has a dedicated practice serving Southwest Airlines employees — including SWAPA-represented pilots — covering topics unique to airline careers: FAA Age 65 planning, the SWA 401(k) and profit-sharing plan, variable pilot income, state-of-residence optimization, SWAPA resource coordination, loss-of-license planning, and retirement-date planning. Wilco Financial is NOT affiliated with or endorsed by Southwest Airlines Co. or SWAPA.

## Important Disclosures

Wilco Financial, LLC is a state-registered investment adviser. Wilco Financial may only transact business or render personalized investment advice in those states and international jurisdictions where it is registered, has filed notice, or is otherwise excluded or exempted from registration requirements. Nothing on this website should be construed as personalized investment advice, which can only be provided in one-on-one communications.

Wilco Financial is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Southwest Airlines Co. or SWAPA (Southwest Airlines Pilots Association).
